data.title: ConnectOne Bancorp, Inc.'s Q4 2025 results show 16 BP NIM increase, 5 branch closures planned, solid credit trends, and dividend declarations.
data.description: The net interest margin has expanded by 16 basis points, showing improving performance metrics gaining momentum. As part of branch rationalization efforts, 5 closures are expected. Credit trends are stable as common and preferred dividends are announced.

data.title: Talisker celebrates one year of safety success with zero lost time incidents at the Bralorne Gold Project.
data.description: In Toronto on January 29, 2026, Talisker Resources Ltd. (TSX: TSK, OTCQB: TSKFF) reported a significant achievement at the Bralorne Gold Project. The company, also known as Talisker, celebrated reaching a noteworthy workplace milestone of one year without any lost time incidents. This accomplishment underscores their commitment to safety and successful operations at Bralorne.

data.title: Coastal Financial Corp. Q4 2025 results show net income of $12.6M, $0.82 per share, down from previous quarters but up for the year.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, Coastal Financial Corporation (Nasdaq: CCB) released their unaudited financial results for the quarter ending December 31, 2025. The company reported a net income of $12.6 million, or $0.82 per diluted common share, which was lower compared to the previous quarter where they reported $13.6 million, or $0.88 per diluted common share. In comparison to the same quarter in 2024, there was also a decrease from $13.4 million, or $0.94 per diluted common share. For the entire year of 2025, Coastal Financial Corporation reported a net income of $47.0 million, or $3.06 per diluted common share, which was slightly higher than the previous year's $45.2 million, or $3.26 per diluted common share.

data.title: Nobel closes private placement offering in Canada, US distribution not authorized.
data.description: The press release is only intended for distribution within Canada and is not authorized for dissemination to United States newswire services or for distribution in the United States.

data.title: Nasdaq's 2025 results show over $5.2B in net revenue and $4.0B in solutions revenue.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, Nasdaq, Inc. (Nasdaq: NDAQ) released their financial results for the last quarter and full year of 2025. This includes a comprehensive overview of their performance and earnings during this period.

data.title: Kymera Therapeutics starts BREADTH Phase 2b Asthma Trial with first patient dosed with KT-621, an oral STAT6 Degrader.
data.description: In a recent report, it was stated that the unemployment rate in the United States has reached 9.3%, with a total of 14.1 million people currently unemployed. This marks a significant increase from the previous month. Additionally, it was revealed that the GDP growth for the last quarter was 2.6%, which exceeded analysts' expectations. Experts attribute this growth to increased consumer spending and investment. In terms of inflation, the rate remains steady at 2.4%. Overall, the economic indicators suggest a mixed outlook for the country's economy, with high unemployment rates but promising GDP growth.

data.title: NJ Transit ordered 375 clean-diesel buses from New Flyer, part of a larger fleet replacement program.
data.description: NFI Group Inc., a prominent provider of bus and coach mobility solutions, along with its subsidiary New Flyer of America Inc., has secured a new order from New Jersey Transit Corporation. The order, comprising 375 Xcelsior® 40-foot clean-diesel transit buses, is a component of a comprehensive fleet modernization initiative by NJ TRANSIT. This procurement comes on the heels of a series of orders made in the latter part of 2025 as part of the multi-phase fleet upgrade plan.

data.title: Fractyl Health's study shows Revita® leads to weight maintenance, improved profile & reduced cravings after 6 months compared to sham.
data.description: Patients who received Revita therapy showed sustained weight maintenance, improved cardiometabolic profile, and decreased cravings for food after 6 months, as opposed to those who received a sham treatment. The study reported excellent levels of safety and tolerability throughout the treatment.

data.title: GCT Semiconductor partners with leading satellite communications provider for global 5G connectivity acceleration.
data.description: An agreement has been reached by GCT Semiconductor with a top satellite communications provider to boost global 5G connectivity. This partnership aims to accelerate the enhancement of 5G technology worldwide. GCT Semiconductor, based in San Jose, California, specializing in 4G technology, collaborates with the leading communications provider to develop and expand 5G capabilities. This collaboration between the two companies signifies a major step towards advancing 5G connectivity on a global scale.

data.title: Winter snowstorm in New Jersey causes spike in slip-and-fall and motor vehicle accident claims, Legal Bay offers settlement funding for victims.
data.description: Legal Bay LLC, a leading Pre-Settlement Funding Company based in Jersey City, New Jersey, stated on January 29, 2026, that victims of the recent winter snowstorm in New Jersey have legal options and settlement funding available. The hazardous winter conditions have prompted Legal Bay to highlight support for those affected.

data.title: Virtu Financial, Inc. reports Q4 2025 results, ended December 31, 2025, as a leading provider of financial services.
data.description: Virtu Financial, Inc., a prominent financial services provider utilizing advanced technology to offer transparent trading solutions and global market liquidity, recently disclosed its Q4 results for the period ending December 31, 2025. This report was released on January 29, 2026. Virtu Financial, Inc. is traded on the NYSE under the symbol VIRT.

data.title: Laser by Aleya compares laser and microneedling for skin rejuvenation, catering to clients' needs.
data.description: In Great Neck, New York, as of January 29, 2026, Laser by Aleya has observed an increasing demand for specialized treatments addressing pigmentation, scarring, and skin texture issues. In response to this trend, the clinic is assisting a growing number of clients in comparing laser procedures to microneedling. This shift reflects a notable uptick in patient interest towards tailored solutions for skincare concerns, with a focus on achieving optimal results.

data.title: BD and Envetec showcase recycling solution for lab plastics in healthcare, promoting sustainability.
data.description: A recent study has discovered a potential sustainable solution for polystyrene petri dishes, PET tubes, medical tubing, and polypropylene syringes used in healthcare supply chains. This breakthrough research comes from a collaboration between BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) and partners in Franklin Lakes, N.J., Birdhill, Colo., and Tipperary, Ireland. The study was published on Jan. 29, 2026, and introduces an eco-friendly approach to materials that are crucial in the healthcare sector. By implementing these sustainable alternatives, the industry could significantly reduce its environmental impact. This development has the potential to revolutionize the production and use of key medical supplies, such as petri dishes and syringes, across the healthcare sector.

data.title: Bitcoin drops below $88,000, gold hits all-time high. Liquidations reach $342.45M in 24 hours. Bitcoin ETFs see $19.6M outflows, Ethereum ETFs have $28.1M inflows.
data.description: Bitcoin has dropped below the $88,000 mark as gold hits new record highs. Liquidations have reached $342.45 million in the last 24 hours. Bitcoin ETFs experienced net outflows of $19.6 million, while Ethereum ETFs saw net inflows of $28.1 million on Wednesday. Current cryptocurrency prices are as follows: Bitcoin (BTC) - $87,639, Ethereum (ETH) - $2,9273, Solana (SOL) - $122.81, XRP - $1.86, Dogecoin (DOGE) - $0.1208, Shiba Inu (SHIB) - $0.057546. Analysis and more details can be found on Benzinga.com. Trader George Trader shared insights on the market trends.

data.title: Lockheed Martin and DoW sign agreement to quadruple THAAD production capacity and open new center in AR.
data.description: Lockheed Martin (LMT), a leading defense contractor, has recently announced plans to expand its operations by constructing a new Munitions Acceleration Center in Arkansas. This facility is expected to significantly increase the production of Terminal High Altitude Area Defense (THAAD) systems. The company signed a framework agreement with the Department of War (DoW) to quadruple the current production output. The groundbreaking ceremony for the new center is scheduled to take place on January 29, 2026, in Camden, Arkansas. This move reflects Lockheed Martin's commitment to meeting the growing demand for advanced defense systems.

data.title: Bread Financial declares quarterly dividends on preferred and common stock for Q1 2026.
data.description: Today, Bread Financial disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved quarterly dividends on both its preferred and common stock for the initial quarter of 2026.

data.title: DT Midstream CEO David Slater named Executive Chairman, replacing Robert Skaggs Jr. on Jan 28, 2026. Skaggs to stay on Board.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, DT Midstream, Inc. (NYSE: DTM) revealed that David Slater, the current CEO, has been appointed as the new Executive Chairman of the Board of Directors. This change in leadership marks the exit of former Chairman, Robert Skaggs, Jr., who will continue serving as a board member. The transition took place in Detroit, as announced by the company in a press release on January 29, 2026. The move reflects strategic shifts within the company's top management, aiming to uphold corporate governance and operational oversight. The company's stakeholders and shareholders will be closely observing this key development as it unfolds in the coming months.
